subcodes.first_line: O handmaiden of God! Your noble brother traversed the realm of contingent existence and seized the chalice of the love of God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امه الله برادر بزرگوارت عرصه امکان بپیمود و پیمانه محبت الله بدست گرفته
subcodes.subjects: @eulogies; reminiscences, @call to action, @service to others; to the Cause of God
